rationale: PR title is 'feat: Build full Lumira Launcher — cyberpunk GTA multiplayer launcher' and the body claims 11 pages (Home, Server Browser, Hosting, Marketplace, Premium, Friends, Mods, Staff Panel, Owner Dashboard, Settings, Notifications), loading/login screens with animated particles, owner dashboard with analytics, full staff role system, etc. The 'Review & Testing Checklist' instructs the reviewer to run `npm run dev`, verify the loading screen animation plays, and navigate through all 11 pages via the sidebar — clearly presupposing source code exists. The actual diff modifies only README.md: it replaces the boilerplate Vite/React README with marketing prose describing the launcher. No .tsx, no components/, no pages/, no auth code, no router config exists in the diff. The stated goal of 'Build full Lumira Launcher' is not delivered; only documentation describing the imagined product is added.
